svg.text: AI governance landscape for automotive embedded SW

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the EU AI Act and automotive')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about GDPR and AI data governance')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about UNECE R155 R156 automotive cybersecurity')
sendPrompt('Tell me about EU type approval and AI')
sendPrompt('Explain NIST AI RMF four functions Govern Map Measure Manage')
sendPrompt('Explain ISO IEC 42001 AI management system')
sendPrompt('How does ISO 26262 apply to AI assisted code generation')
sendPrompt('How does ISO PAS 8800 apply to AI in automotive development')
sendPrompt('How does ASPICE relate to AI governance')
sendPrompt('What is ISO 21448 SOTIF and AI')
sendPrompt('Show me how AICE audit trail works')
sendPrompt('Show me how AICE review gate works')
sendPrompt('Show me how AICE traceability works')
sendPrompt('Show me AICE RBAC and Cerbos authorization')
